NeuronWriter

NLP-based content optimization and AI writing tool for SEO

7/10Overall Rating

$23/moStarting Price
2021Founded

About NeuronWriter

NeuronWriter is a ai seo & marketing platform founded in 2021. It positions itself as “NLP-based content optimization and AI writing tool for SEO” and is best suited for budget SEOs, content writers, bloggers. Pricing starts at $23/mo.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Keyword ResearchYes
Rank TrackingNo
Site AuditNo
Backlink AnalysisNo
Content OptimizationYes
Competitor AnalysisYes
Ai WritingYes
Serp AnalysisYes
ReportingNo
Api AccessNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Very affordable NLP content optimization
  • Good competitor content analysis
  • Lifetime deals available

Cons

  • Smaller database than major tools
  • Interface can feel cluttered
  • Limited to content optimization
